---
title: Usage Meter
description: Track usage limits for checkout sessions, webhooks, payouts, or subscriptions.
---

import { UsageMeterDemo } from '@/components/lomi-ui/demo';

# Usage Meter

Use this for account limits, plan usage, or customer portal consumption.

## Preview

<UsageMeterDemo />

## Installation

<Installation name="usage-meter" />

## Usage

```tsx
import { UsageMeter } from '@/components/lomi-ui/usage-meter';

<UsageMeter
  items={[
    { label: 'Checkout sessions', used: 820, limit: 1000 },
    { label: 'Payouts', used: 89, limit: 100 },
  ]}
/>;
```

## Props

| Prop | Type | Description |
| ---- | ---- | ----------- |
| `items` | `UsageMeterItem[]` | Usage rows. |
| `title` | `string` | Optional heading. |
| `description` | `string` | Optional supporting text. |
